description: Create a professional client notification letter for GlobalTrade Consulting dated December 15, 2024, containing a standard compliance notice. Using the data source at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\clients.csv, include merge fields for ContactName, CompanyName, Address, City, PostalCode, and Country in the address block, and ContactName in the greeting. Save the mail merge template as C:\Users\Docker\Documents\notification_letter.docx and the final merged document for all clients as C:\Users\Docker\Documents\merged_letters.docx.
